COURT AND COUNSEL MEET FOR JUDICIAL MEDIATION. THE PARTIES HAVE REACHED AN UN FILED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, SIGNED BY COUNSEL AND PARTIES. WHEN THE CERTAIN TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE FULFILLED, COUNSEL IS TO NOTIFY JUDGE GOLDSMITH THAT THE MATTER HAS SETTLED AND THE MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND TRO SHOULD BE VACATED. PLAINTIFF WILL PROMPTLY FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6, THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION OVER THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: R. GOULDING; NOT REPORTED
